name: Tankbot Battle
short_description: A fast paced, action packed, roguelite game with tanks! Blast your way through procedurally generated levels, and build overpowered combinations of upgrades! Face off against a variety of different enemies and epic bosses.
detailed_description:
Tankbot Battle is a fast paced top-down-shooter, featuring procedurally generated levels, fun enemies, and engaging combat! Inspired by old flash games, Tankbot Battle aims to provide a modern twist on the genre, with an extra dose of explosions and chaos!

Features

  • Exciting combat

Engage in fast paced combat with enemy tanks!

  • Procedurally generated levels

Explore randomly generating levels; no two playthroughs will be the same!

  • Chaotic upgrades and abilities

At the end of each level, pick between one of 3 different upgrades! Build epic combinations and synergies to become unstoppable!

  • Stylized graphics

Cartoony and clean graphics reminiscent of old flash games!

  • Awesome Bosses

Fight against 4 different bosses with fun and unique attack patterns!

  • 3 unique weapons to master

Each weapon has its own use case, and knowing the right time to switch between them is key to victory!

  • Fun enemies

Stay agile and avoid the onslaught of enemy attacks! Dodge explosive missiles, avoid snipers, and destroy enemies with explosive barrels!
